problem_text_cn:
3-4 如图3-4所示，表面光滑，高$h$、倾角$\phi$的劈形物块以恒定速度$u$水平朝右运动，在其斜面顶端有一个质量$m$的小木块从相对静止状态开始滑到底端。
(1)计算小木块相对劈形物块的末速度大小$v^{\prime}$；
(2)在地面系计算小木块动能总增量$\Delta E_{k}$；
(3)在地面系计算斜面支持力$N$对小木块所作总功$W_{N}$；
(4)在地面系验证$W_{N}+W_{g}=\Delta E_{k}$，其中$W_{g}$是重力对小木块所作总功。
problem_text_en:
3-4 As shown in Figure 3-4, a smooth wedge of height $h$ and inclination angle $\phi$ moves to the right with constant horizontal velocity $u$. A small block of mass $m$ starts from rest relative to the wedge and slides down from the top of the inclined surface.
(1) Calculate the final speed $v^{\prime}$ of the block relative to the wedge.
(2) In the ground frame, compute the total change in kinetic energy $\Delta E_{k}$ of the block.
(3) In the ground frame, compute the total work $W_{N}$ done on the block by the normal force $N$ from the inclined surface.
(4) In the ground frame, verify that $W_{N}+W_{g}=\Delta E_{k}$, where $W_{g}$ is the total work done by gravity on the block.
problem_solution_cn:
解(1) 在劈形物块参考系中$N$不作功，据动能定理有
$$ W_{g}=\frac{1}{2}m v^{\prime 2},\quad W_{g}=mgh, $$
即得
$$ v^{\prime}=\sqrt{2gh}. $$

(2) 地面系中小物块初速度$u$，末速度为图3-5所示的$v^{\prime}+u$，动能增量为
$$ \begin{align*}\Delta E_{k}&=\frac{1}{2}m\left[\left(v^{\prime}\cos\phi-u\right)^{2}+\left(v^{\prime}\sin\phi\right)^{2}\right]-\frac{1}{2}mu^{2}\\&=m(gh-\sqrt{2gh}\cdot u\cos\phi).\end{align*} $$

(3) 如图3-6所示，$dt$时间小物块位移$dI_{1}+dI_{2}$，其中$dI_{1}$由小木块相对斜面运动引起，它与支持力$N$垂直，$dI_{2}=u\,dt$，于是$N$作功
$$ \begin{align*}dW_{N}&=N\cdot\left(dI_{1}+dI_{2}\right)=N\cdot dI_{2}\\&=N\cdot u\, dt=N_{//}u\, dt=(-Nu\sin\phi)dt.\end{align*} $$
设下滑时间为$t$，得
$$ W_{N}=(-Nu\sin\phi)t,\quad N=mg\cos\phi, $$
在劈形物块参考系中，小物块下滑加速度$a=g\sin\phi$，可算得
$$ t=\sqrt{\frac{2h}{g}}\cdot\frac{1}{\sin\phi}, $$
即得
$$ W_{N}=-mu\sqrt{2gh}\cdot\cos\phi. $$

(4) 地面系中，重力功是$W_{g}=mgh$，于是有
$$ W_{g}+W_{N}=mgh-mu\sqrt{2gh}\cdot\cos\phi, $$
联系(2)问所得$\Delta E_{k}$表述式，即得
$$ W_{N}+W_{g}=\Delta E_{k}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) In the wedge frame, the normal force $N$ does no work. By the work‑energy theorem,
$$ W_{g}=\frac{1}{2}m v^{\prime 2},\quad W_{g}=mgh, $$
hence
$$ v^{\prime}=\sqrt{2gh}. $$

(2) In the ground frame, the block’s initial velocity is $u$; its final velocity is $v^{\prime}+u$ as shown in Figure 3-5. The change in kinetic energy is
$$ \begin{align*}\Delta E_{k}&=\frac{1}{2}m\left[\left(v^{\prime}\cos\phi-u\right)^{2}+\left(v^{\prime}\sin\phi\right)^{2}\right]-\frac{1}{2}mu^{2}\\&=m(gh-\sqrt{2gh}\cdot u\cos\phi).\end{align*} $$

(3) As shown in Figure 3-6, in time $dt$ the displacement of the block is $dI_{1}+dI_{2}$, where $dI_{1}$ arises from the block’s motion relative to the wedge and is perpendicular to the normal force $N$, and $dI_{2}=u\,dt$. Thus the work done by $N$ is
$$ \begin{align*}dW_{N}&=N\cdot\left(dI_{1}+dI_{2}\right)=N\cdot dI_{2}\\&=N\cdot u\, dt=N_{//}u\, dt=(-Nu\sin\phi)dt.\end{align*} $$
Let the total sliding time be $t$. Then
$$ W_{N}=(-Nu\sin\phi)t,\quad N=mg\cos\phi. $$
In the wedge frame, the block’s acceleration down the incline is $a=g\sin\phi$, so
$$ t=\sqrt{\frac{2h}{g}}\cdot\frac{1}{\sin\phi}. $$
Hence
$$ W_{N}=-mu\sqrt{2gh}\cdot\cos\phi. $$

(4) In the ground frame, the work done by gravity is $W_{g}=mgh$. Therefore,
$$ W_{g}+W_{N}=mgh-mu\sqrt{2gh}\cdot\cos\phi, $$
which matches the expression for $\Delta E_{k}$ obtained in part (2), confirming
$$ W_{N}+W_{g}=\Delta E_{k}. $$
img_cn: 页面为一道物理题及解答过程。题目是光滑劈形物块以速度 u 水平向右运动，顶端小木块从相对静止下滑。包含题干、4 个小问及详细解答，有图 3-4、图 3-5、图 3-6 示意图辅助说明。
img_en: The page shows a physics problem and its solution process. The problem involves a smooth wedge-shaped object moving horizontally to the right with speed u, and a small wooden block sliding down from rest at its top. It includes the question statement, 4 sub-questions, and detailed solutions, with diagrams Fig. 3-4, Fig. 3-5, and Fig. 3-6 for illustration.
